values.universe.derelict-extant-part-1.title: Derelict Extant
values.location.cryopod.title: Cryopod
values.location.cryopod.description: Darkness presses against the narrow pressure shell.
values.action.open-your-eyes.title: Open Your Eyes
values.action.open-your-eyes.description: Force your eyes open against the cold.
values.action.open-your-eyes.success: Frost webs the pod window inches from your face. A damaged status lamp pulses beyond it, and the machinery beneath you misses every third beat.
values.action.open-your-eyes.failure: Your eyelids lift briefly. Cold and darkness close over the glimpse.

data.privateNotes: Bootstrapped the smallest playable draft with a single short waking action; further confinement choices will follow its resolved sensory outcome.

values.universe.derelict-extant-part-1.title: Derelict Extant
values.universe.derelict-extant-part-1.descript: A survival-horror mystery aboard a ruined vessel.
values.location.cryopod.title: Cryopod
values.location.cryopod.description: Darkness presses against the narrow pressure shell.
values.action.open-your-eyes.title: Open Your Eyes
values.action.open-your-eyes.description: Force your eyes open against the cold.
values.action.open-your-eyes.success: Frost webs the pod window inches from your face. A damaged status lamp pulses beyond it, and the machinery beneath you misses every third beat.
values.action.open-your-eyes.failure: Your eyelids lift briefly. Cold and darkness close over the glimpse.

data.privateNotes: Corrected the rejected manifest and starting-location shapes while preserving the focused opening action.

narration: Frost webs the pod window inches from your face. A damaged status lamp pulses beyond it, and the machinery beneath you misses every third beat.

values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.title: Wipe the Frost
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.descriptio: Clear a patch of the pod window with your hand.
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.success: The frost smears beneath your palm. Beyond the glass, loose cables hang over a dark compartment, and a strip of stars shows through a breach in the far wall.
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.failure: The frost softens but will not clear. Only a few fixed points of light show through it.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.title: Inspect the Status Lamp
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.description: Study the damaged indicator beside the window.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.success: Three symbols cycle beneath cracked plastic: temperature failure, memory interface offline, lid actuator fault. The last symbol remains lit longer than the others.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.failure: The lamp gutters while you watch. Its fractured symbols do not hold long enough to read.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.title: Listen to the Machinery
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.descripti: Hold still and separate the pod's sounds from the vessel around it.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.success: A pump knocks twice, pauses, then fails to catch on the third stroke. Behind it, metal ticks slowly as the hull loses heat.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.failure: Your breathing fills the shell. The machinery beneath it remains uneven and indistinct.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.title: Search the Lid Seam
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.description: Trace the edge of the lid for a latch or manual release.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.success: Your fingers find a recessed lever below your left shoulder. Its cover is missing, and frozen lubricant binds the exposed hinge.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.failure: The seam is numbingly cold. Your fingers slip before they find purchase.

data.privateNotes: The opening choices establish the exposed room, pod failure, and a discoverable manual escape route without front-loading an explanation.

narration: The frost smears beneath your palm. Beyond the glass, loose cables hang over a dark compartment, and a strip of stars shows through a breach in the far wall.

values.location.cryobay.title: Cryobay
values.location.cryobay.description: Dead cryopods line a compartment open to the star field beyond a fractured outer wall.
values.action.force-pod-lid.title: Force the Pod Lid
values.action.force-pod-lid.description: Brace against the shell and drive the failed lid actuator open.
values.action.force-pod-lid.success: The actuator chatters, catches, and tears free with a metal snap. The lid rises far enough to crawl beneath, spilling cold vapor across the deck.
values.action.force-pod-lid.failure: The lid lifts a finger's width before the actuator slips. Frost closes over the gap.

data.privateNotes: The cleared window now enables direct escape progress while the remaining pod investigations stay optional.

narration: Your fingers find a recessed lever below your left shoulder. Its cover is missing, and frozen lubricant binds the exposed hinge.

values.action.work-manual-release.title: Work the Manual Release
values.action.work-manual-release.description: Rock the exposed lever until the frozen hinge gives.
values.action.work-manual-release.success: The lubricant fractures like thin glass. The lever drops, bolts withdraw around the shell, and the lid rises on exhausted springs.
values.action.work-manual-release.failure: The lever moves once, then freezes against its housing. The lid bolts remain seated.

data.privateNotes: Finding the lever now provides a faster, controlled escape route while forcing the lid remains a slower alternative.

narration: The lubricant fractures like thin glass. The lever drops, bolts withdraw around the shell, and the lid rises on exhausted springs.

values.item.space-suit.title: Spacesuit
values.item.space-suit.description: A sealed utility suit with an integral air system.
values.item.air-canister.title: Air Canister
values.item.air-canister.description: A compact replacement canister for the suit recycler.
values.item.water-pouch.title: Water Pouch
values.item.water-pouch.description: A small sealed pouch of drinking water.
values.item.food-ration.title: Food Ration
values.item.food-ration.description: A dense emergency ration in foil packaging.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.title: Open the Emergency Locker
values.action.open-emergency-locker.description: Force open the marked locker beside the airlock.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.success: The warped door yields. A folded spacesuit hangs inside beside two air canisters, one water pouch, and a single foil ration.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.failure: The locker door flexes against its bent frame but does not release.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.title: Inspect the Airlock
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.descripti: Check the only intact exit and its pressure controls.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.success: The inner door still seals. Its panel shows vacuum beyond and warns that opening it will vent the cryobay through damaged equalization valves.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.failure: The pressure display flickers between unreadable values. The inner door remains locked in its frame.
values.action.watch-the-stars.title: Watch the Stars
values.action.watch-the-stars.description: Study the strip of star field visible through the fractured outer wall.
values.action.watch-the-stars.success: The stars drift with the vessel, stop, then retrace several seconds of motion before continuing. Loose frost on the glass does not move with them.
values.action.watch-the-stars.failure: Reflections from the failing status lights cross the glass. The stars remain difficult to track.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.title: Check the Cryobay Console
values.action.check-cryobay-console.description: Wake the room console and review the remaining ship systems.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.success: Most compartments return no signal. A main intersection and the captain's deck still answer, but the route begins beyond the airlock.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.failure: The console wakes to a field of dead compartment indicators, then loses power.

data.privateNotes: The cryobay now offers finite survival supplies, a dangerous exit to assess, the first temporal observation, and a concrete route deeper into the vessel.

expectedActions.label: Inspect the other cryopods
expectedActions.reason: Dead cryopods line the room, so checking them for survivors or useful information seems natural.

narration: The warped door yields. A folded spacesuit hangs inside beside two air canisters, one water pouch, and a single foil ration.

values.resource.air.title: Suit Air
values.resource.air.description: Breathable air remaining in the spacesuit system.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.title: Put On the Spacesuit
values.action.put-on-space-suit.description: Seal the utility suit and start its air system.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.success: The neck ring locks after two attempts. The suit stiffens under pressure, and its air gauge climbs to full.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.failure: The neck seal folds beneath the locking ring. The suit refuses to pressurize.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.title: Open the Airlock
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.description: Cycle the inner door and expose the cryobay to vacuum.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.success: The damaged valves open together. Vapor tears across the deck, the room falls silent, and the airlock indicator turns green.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.failure: The valves shudder without opening. The inner door remains sealed.

data.privateNotes: The player expected an option to wear the recovered suit. That action now establishes a concrete air reserve, and opening the airlock records decompression while consuming part of it.

values.resource.air.title: Suit Air
values.resource.air.description: Breathable air remaining in the spacesuit system.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.title: Inspect the Other Cryopods
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.descriptio: Check the remaining pods for occupants, records, or usable equipment.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.success: The other lids stand open. Their restraints retain human-shaped pressure marks, but the shells contain only brittle sensor leads and a film of gray dust.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.failure: Clouded windows and dead displays conceal whatever remains inside the other pods.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.title: Put On the Spacesuit
values.action.put-on-space-suit.description: Seal the utility suit and start its air system.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.success: The neck ring locks after two attempts. The suit stiffens under pressure, and its air gauge climbs to full.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.failure: The neck seal folds beneath the locking ring. The suit refuses to pressurize.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.title: Open the Airlock
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.description: Cycle the inner door and expose the cryobay to vacuum.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.success: The damaged valves open together. Vapor tears across the deck, the room falls silent, and the airlock indicator turns green.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.failure: The valves shudder without opening. The inner door remains sealed.

data.privateNotes: Added the player's requested inspection of the other cryopods and records its discovery as state. Suiting up establishes the air reserve needed for the hazardous airlock route.

feedback.confusion: It is unclear whether putting on the suit will automatically use one of the air canisters.

narration: The neck ring locks after two attempts. The suit stiffens under pressure, and its air gauge climbs to full.

values.location.main-intersection.title: Main Intersection
values.location.main-intersection.description: Four unlit corridors meet beneath a cracked navigation panel. Loose wiring hangs motionless in the vacuum.
values.action.replace-air-canister.title: Replace an Air Canister
values.action.replace-air-canister.description: Consume one spare canister to restore 50 suit air. The gauge must be half empty or lower.
values.action.replace-air-canister.success: The empty canister releases with a hard twist. The replacement seats, and the suit gauge climbs by half its full range.
values.action.replace-air-canister.failure: The coupling refuses to unlock. No air transfers from the spare canister.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.title: Cross the Airlock
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.description: Leave the vented cryobay and spend suit air crossing into the dark junction.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.success: Your boots lock and release across the threshold. Ten points vanish from the air gauge before you reach the main intersection.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.failure: The outer hatch binds before you clear it. You retreat into the cryobay with the passage still blocked.
values.action.read-junction-map.title: Read the Junction Map
values.action.read-junction-map.description: Spend suit air tracing the surviving labels on the navigation panel.
values.action.read-junction-map.success: Emergency power reveals four routes: engineering, crew quarters, communications, and the captain's deck. Several intermediate compartments no longer answer.
values.action.read-junction-map.failure: The panel dies before its route labels stabilize.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.title: Trace the Captain's Route
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.descript: Follow physical deck markings toward the captain's section while suit air falls.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.success: A faded command stripe turns into the starboard corridor. Scraped handprints continue along it where the gravity plating failed.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.failure: Broken wall panels interrupt the command stripe before its direction becomes clear.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.title: Inspect the Hull Damage
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.descr: Use suit air checking the junction for the cause and direction of the breach.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.succe: The wall plates bend outward, away from the vessel's center. A narrow impact groove continues toward communications.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.failu: Layers of torn insulation conceal the damage beneath the outer plating.

data.privateNotes: The canisters now have an explicit finite refill action that consumes one canister and restores measurable suit air only when capacity is available. Airlock traversal and every vacuum investigation spend authoritative air, while the destination provides distinct finite choices.

narration: Most compartments return no signal. A main intersection and the captain's deck still answer, but the route begins beyond the airlock.

data.privateNotes: The console outcome confirms that the route begins beyond the airlock. Existing suit, airlock, canister, and traversal actions already express the warranted next choices, so no additional side content is needed.

narration: The inner door still seals. Its panel shows vacuum beyond and warns that opening it will vent the cryobay through damaged equalization valves.

data.privateNotes: The current validated actions already provide coherent survival preparation and airlock traversal choices; this outcome does not warrant additional content.

narration: The other lids stand open. Their restraints retain human-shaped pressure marks, but the shells contain only brittle sensor leads and a film of gray dust.

data.privateNotes: The current action set already supports the next required progression step, and this outcome does not justify additional content.

narration: The damaged valves open together. Vapor tears across the deck, the room falls silent, and the airlock indicator turns green.

data.privateNotes: The existing airlock crossing action is the coherent next progression step; no new content is warranted.

narration: Your boots lock and release across the threshold. Ten points vanish from the air gauge before you reach the main intersection.
